localization.name: Water Blast
localization.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

localization.name: Cursed Torrent
localization.description:
Removes all Sleep wards from enemy units on the battlefield.

Then grants 1 random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. This effect triggers 4 times.

If no enemies were sleeping at the start of the turn, the user will immediately get the next turn. Usable if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are sleeping. Usable 5 times per battle.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.
localization.selected:
Removes Sleep wards & grants Cursed Sleep
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Powerful Slam
localization.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Grants the target the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.
localization.selected:
300% damage, grants Sleep
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Crashing Anchor
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead to sleeping targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.
localization.selected: Up to 500% damage, ignores damage reduction

localization.name: Out To Sea
localization.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are sleeping on the battlefield, this unit will immediately be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

localization.name: Captain's Demands
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 1% of their max HP.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.
